items.title: Awesome game!
items.summary: I love this game! I wish this game would get more attention. Iam a player from germany and a big fan. The music, the art, the gamestyle is just chefs kiss. Very generous with freebies, the most generous gacha game I have ever played! Please keep up the good work!
items.author: Inagoeoqmfmd
